features: Fix: Resolve 'Preserve Host Header' UI checkbox state persistence bug
Feature: Add visual status pill for Host header preservation in Client Inspector UI
Feature: Custom Admin-defined Maintenance Pages for gateway
Feature: Implement responsive 2-column UI settings layout
Feature: Add light theme icon variant for client applications
Fix: Resolve 'Connect' failure in Windows 11 GUI caused by log file locks and console window flashing
Fix: Resolve SentinelOne quarantine interference during self-upgrade by downloading to whitelisted path
Feature: Implement Live Logs UI in Client Inspector
Fix: Resolve ignored background flag when gui flag is present
Fix: Resolve client UI localization bugs in English and other languages
Fix: Align and fix E2E automated test suite for Playwright container compatibility
Feature: Implement Client Inspector Theme Synchronization (Dark/Light mode) from Server Account to local UI
Feature: Add local UI Theme Override dropdown and '-theme' CLI flag to force specific display modes
Feature: Implement Client Inspector UI Localization with multi-language support (EN, DE, ES, IT, JA)
